film.title: Chi
film.overview: Director Anne Wheeler joins actress Babz Chula on a trip to India to rid herself of cancer.

dialogues.dialogue: in the drawers of all my pretty thrills.  Cyclops, we have been struck by a plague  that will put that biblical pestilence s**t to shame.    And this famine only affects   the lower regions    where all you young Trojans    do most of your thinking.
